state.next-action: The shared auth foundation, reader workspace contract, and DB-backed reading-state sync are now in place: owner seed, tenant/org seed, long-lived sessions, entitlement/viewer helpers, host-facing login/logout/session routes, reader library/settings/reading-state collections, and built-in-book annotation/progress sync that still keeps local EPUB import local until explicit upload. Next, let Books execute books-reader-05-03 on top of that layer, then migrate Listen private media to the same access model.

agent-id-policy.rule: Optional: register a unique id in STATE.xml before claiming tasks if you use CLI task-update.
